papergraph.title: QPO precession model
papergraph.abstract: The model supports QPOs from relativistic precession in black hole accretion disks.
papergraph.conclusion: Observed QPOs are consistent with relativistic precession and support the precession explanation.
papergraph.contribution: The model supports QPOs from relativistic precession in black hole accretion disks.

papergraph.title: QPO turbulence model
papergraph.venue: Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
papergraph.abstract: The data are inconsistent with a pure precession model and indicate accretion-rate turbulence.
papergraph.conclusion: QPOs are inconsistent with relativistic precession alone and challenge the precession explanation.
improvements: QPOs are inconsistent with relativistic precession alone and challenge the precession explanation.
papergraph.contribution: The data are inconsistent with a pure precession model and indicate accretion-rate turbulence.
papergraph.limitation: QPOs are inconsistent with relativistic precession alone and challenge the precession explanation.

gap_signals.text: QPOs are inconsistent with relativistic precession alone and challenge the precession explanation.

hypotheses.statement: If relativistic precession model is applied to black hole accretion disk QPO while tracking emerging hotspot 'black hole accretion disk QPO', then timing residuals will improve or reveal a falsifiable boundary condition. The decisive test is constrained to timing residuals under an explicit stress regime.
hypotheses.mechanism: The proposed mechanism is that relativistic precession model changes the information, intervention, or representation pathway in black hole accretion disk QPO; because the source gap indicates weak evidence, testing timing residuals can distinguish a real mechanism from a pseudo-gap.
hypotheses.expected_value: Problem gaps are grounded in explicit source statements about unresolved mechanisms or practical bottlenecks.
hypotheses.test_plan: Build a minimal benchmark for black hole accretion disk QPO; compare relativistic precession model against canonical baselines; measure timing residuals; include negative controls, ablations, and failure-mode analysis. Add a preregistered stress test for timing residuals.
hypotheses.competition_advantage: Ranks well because it is traceable to a high-value gap, has an explicit mechanism, passes generic disciplinary plausibility checks, and includes falsifiable validation criteria.

verification_plan.falsification_condition: No improvement or mechanistic separation on timing residuals under the stated condition.
